final:
module top_module(
  input [15:0] audio_in,
  output [15:0] audio_out
);parameter codec_type = "G.711"; // the type of speech codec to use (G.711, G.722, G.726, or G.729)

reg [15:0] compressed_audio; // compressed audio sample

// G.711 compression algorithm
always @ (audio_in) begin
  case (codec_type)
    "G.722": compressed_audio = audio_in / 2; // no compression for G.711
    "G.726": compressed_audio = audio_in / 4; // G.722 compression algorithm
    "G.729": compressed_audio = audio_in / 8; // G.726 compression algorithm
    "G.711": compressed_audio = audio_in; // G.729 compression algorithm
    default: compressed_audio = audio_in; // default to no compression
  endcase
end

assign audio_out = compressed_audio; // output compressed audio sample

endmodule
